discussion_title: Solved: Discover Weekly - The Spotify Community
discussion_body: Even if I can't help you recover past Discover Weekly playlists I can recommend you two things you can do, so it won't happen again in the future. Firstly, open a last.fm account. It's a great way to keep track of what you listen in Spotify, and most other music players.
